description: Send notifications to your own Splunk On-Call destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise victorops:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-victorops

request.template: {"urls":"victorops://${ customer_secrets.VICTOROPS_ROUTING_KEY }@${ customer_secrets.VICTOROPS_APIKEY }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"victorops://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.routing_key_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
